mapper.sql: r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.level, r.sort_order, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.created_by, r.updated_by, r.remark, r.status, r.is_deleted, r.opt_lock_version
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC, r.id ASC
